data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for "I'm on my way" notifications, which is explicitly mentioned in the linked use case. However, the evidence provided does not include any API reads or persisted state checks that confirm this functionality is implemented or operational. The absence of such evidence indicates a clear gap in the coverage of this requirement, as no notifications or related data are presented to support its fulfillment.
gaps: "I'm on my way" notifications are not evidenced as implemented.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add evidence for notification implementation
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Confirm that notifications are sent when the service provider is en route.
